overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist swimming through flooded ancient ruins at sunset, approaching a shoreline settlement with campfires, and transitioning to walking through a dense forest with gothic stone structures overgrown by vegetation.

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily through calm water toward the setting sun, creating ripples on the surface

entered.detail: tall thin metal structure visible in the distance against the pink sky
dense tree line along the distant shore silhouetted by sunset
bright golden reflection of the sun on the water surface creating a path of light
partially sunken stone structures visible in the water ahead

segments.scene_description: The character swims through calm open water during a vibrant sunset, with golden light reflecting off the surface. A distant metal tower stands on the right while forested shorelines frame the horizon, and submerged ruins hint at the flooded civilization below.

events.description: shoreline settlement with burning campfires becomes visible ahead on the left

agents.ego_description: swimming toward the shoreline settlement while passing coastal rock formations

entered.detail: tall stone tower rising above the trees at the settlement site
multiple orange burning fires visible on the shore among wooden structures
primitive wooden buildings and docks along the waterline

segments.scene_description: As the character swims closer to the left shore, a settlement with burning campfires and a prominent stone tower comes into view. The gothic ruins that were on the right now lie ahead, while the sun's glare shifts out of direct view.

events.description: swimming into the shadow of large gothic cathedral ruins with stone archways
character reaches shallow water and stands up to walk onto the shore

agents.ego_description: swimming through the ruins and transitioning to walking as the water becomes shallow near the stone structures

entered.detail: massive stone cathedral structure with broken walls and overgrown vegetation
large gothic arches forming doorways through the submerged ruins
water depth decreasing to reveal stone flooring beneath the surface

segments.scene_description: The character swims through the imposing gothic cathedral ruins, passing under stone archways as the water grows shallow. The settlement fires fade behind as the character reaches the shore and stands up among the ancient stone structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path with ancient ruins

events.description: hard cut from waterfront ruins to dark forest interior with dramatic lighting change
walking through areas with golden sunbeams filtering through the tree canopy

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a forest path surrounded by dense vegetation and red flowering plants

entered.detail: tall dense trees forming a canopy overhead with dappled light filtering through
narrow winding trail through the forest floor with patches of grass
vibrant red flowering bushes lining both sides of the path
overgrown ancient stone wall partially covered in vines and moss

segments.scene_description: Following a transition to a dense forest interior, the character walks along a dirt path lined with vibrant red flowers and ancient stone ruins. Golden sunbeams pierce through the tree canopy, creating a dramatic shift from the open waterfront to the enclosed woodland environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a wide, sun-drenched aquatic expanse into the enclosed depths of a lush, ancient forest. It begins with the character swimming through calm open water under a vibrant sunset, with golden light reflecting off the surface and submerged ruins visible below. As the character nears the left shore, the perspective shifts toward a settlement marked by burning campfires and a prominent stone tower, while the sun's glare recedes. The camera then glides through imposing gothic cathedral ruins and under stone archways as the water grows shallow, finally leading the character onto the shore. The scene then transitions into a dense forest interior, where the open waterfront gives way to a dirt path lined with red flowers and golden sunbeams piercing through the canopy above ancient stone ruins.
